text:
# Chat with Data (POC)  
Nationwide - IBM Gen AI Demo 2025  
Challenge:  
NBS holds large volumes of scattered knowledge across SharePoint, Teams, Service Now, and Confluence. Each new Chat-with-Data use case required a bespoke build such as manual indexing, RAG setup, and repeated engineering effort. No unified, reusable pattern existed for ingestion, retrieval and query handling.  
Developed Solution:  
Built a reusable agentic RAG pattern in Microsoft AI Foundry with Terraform provisioning that automates end-to-end workflows.The POC established a single, repeatable template that can index data from multiple sources and be deployed as a modular plug-and-play component for future Chat-with-Data use cases.  
Use case learnings -Pathfinder for Agent delivery, repeatable patterns on RAG.  
logo  
85%  
Retrieval Precision on Teams Data  
Reduction in engineering effort for new retrieval systems  
60%
name: Chunk 10/14

raw_entities.name: NBS
raw_entities.description: The client organization managing large volumes of unstructured knowledge across multiple collaboration and service platforms. The organization faced significant operational inefficiencies due to fragmented data repositories and a lack of standardized ingestion patterns.
context: NBS holds large volumes of scattered knowledge across SharePoint, Teams, Service Now, and Confluence.
Each new Chat-with-Data use case required a bespoke build

raw_entities.name: Chat with Data POC
raw_entities.description: A proof-of-concept solution designed to automate data ingestion, retrieval, and query handling for conversational data interactions. The offering establishes a single, repeatable template that functions as a modular plug-and-play component for future use cases.
context: Built a reusable agentic RAG pattern in Microsoft AI Foundry with Terraform provisioning that automates end-to-end workflows.
The POC established a single, repeatable template that can index data from multiple sources

raw_entities.name: Automated Data Ingestion & Retrieval
raw_entities.description: The technical ability to automatically process, index, and retrieve data from multiple disparate sources without manual engineering. This capability eliminates repetitive setup tasks and enables rapid deployment of new data interaction workflows.
context: index data from multiple sources and be deployed as a modular plug-and-play component

raw_entities.name: Chat-with-Data Application
raw_entities.description: The specific scenario where end-users interact with scattered organizational knowledge through a conversational chat interface. This use case leverages the POC to replace manual indexing with automated, AI-driven query handling.
context: Each new Chat-with-Data use case required a bespoke build

raw_entities.name: 85% Retrieval Precision on Teams Data
raw_entities.description: A quantified performance outcome demonstrating high accuracy in retrieving information specifically from Microsoft Teams repositories. This metric validates the effectiveness of the RAG pattern in delivering precise, context-aware answers to user queries.

raw_entities.name: 60% Reduction in Engineering Effort
raw_entities.description: A significant decrease in the development time and manual engineering resources required to build new retrieval systems. This benefit directly addresses the client's previous pain point of repeated, bespoke engineering efforts for each new project.
context: Reduction in engineering effort for new retrieval systems

raw_entities.name: Scattered Knowledge Management
raw_entities.description: The client's struggle with managing large volumes of unstructured knowledge spread across multiple disconnected platforms. This fragmentation created visibility gaps and hindered efficient information access for end-users.
context: NBS holds large volumes of scattered knowledge across SharePoint, Teams, Service Now, and Confluence.

raw_entities.name: Bespoke Build Dependency
raw_entities.description: The reliance on custom, manual engineering for each new data interaction project, leading to repeated effort and zero standardization. This constraint prevented the organization from scaling data solutions efficiently or reusing existing components.
context: Each new Chat-with-Data use case required a bespoke build such as manual indexing, RAG setup, and repeated engineering effort.
No unified, reusable pattern existed for ingestion, retrieval and query handling.

raw_entities.name: Microsoft AI Foundry
raw_entities.description: The primary AI development environment used to architect and provision the agentic RAG pattern. This platform enables the rapid deployment of AI-driven workflows and integrates with the client's existing data sources.
context: Built a reusable agentic RAG pattern in Microsoft AI Foundry

raw_entities.name: Terraform
raw_entities.description: An infrastructure-as-code tool utilized to automate the provisioning and deployment of the solution's underlying architecture. It ensures consistent, repeatable environment setup across different deployment stages.

raw_entities.name: SharePoint
raw_entities.description: A primary document management and collaboration platform holding a significant portion of the client's scattered knowledge base. The solution was designed to ingest and index data from this repository.

raw_entities.name: Microsoft Teams
raw_entities.description: The client's main collaboration and communication channel, serving as a key data source for the chat-with-data use case. The POC specifically validated high retrieval precision for data stored within Teams.

raw_entities.name: ServiceNow
raw_entities.description: An IT service management platform containing operational knowledge and ticketing data. The solution extended data ingestion capabilities to cover this previously siloed repository.

raw_entities.name: Confluence
raw_entities.description: A corporate wiki and documentation platform holding project-specific and institutional knowledge. The POC addressed the challenge of indexing this unstructured documentation alongside other data sources.

raw_entities.name: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
raw_entities.description: The underlying AI architecture pattern used to enhance data retrieval accuracy by combining generative AI with external knowledge bases. The solution leverages a reusable RAG framework to standardize query handling and reduce manual setup.

raw_entities.name: Reusable Agentic RAG Pattern
raw_entities.description: A standardized, repeatable template that eliminates the need for bespoke builds and enables modular, plug-and-play deployment. This asset directly addresses the client's lack of unified patterns and accelerates future project delivery.
context: Built a reusable agentic RAG pattern
POC established a single, repeatable template

raw_entities.name: Pathfinder for Agent Delivery
raw_entities.description: A proven methodology or framework guiding the delivery of AI agents, ensuring consistent application of RAG patterns. This approach standardizes the delivery process and reduces engineering overhead across multiple use cases.
context: Pathfinder for Agent delivery, repeatable patterns on RAG.

raw_entities.name: IBM Gen AI Demo 2025
raw_entities.description: The specific demonstration event where the Chat with Data POC and its performance metrics were presented. This event served as the platform to showcase the solution's capabilities and quantified benefits to stakeholders.

raw_entities.name: Proof of Concept (POC)
raw_entities.description: The initial testing and validation phase that established the repeatable template and quantified performance outcomes. The POC served as the foundational step to prove the viability of the agentic RAG pattern before broader deployment.
context: The POC established a single, repeatable template

raw_entities.name: IBM
raw_entities.description: The technology partner associated with the Gen AI Demo event and the provider of the underlying AI and consulting expertise. IBM's involvement lends credibility and domain expertise to the demonstrated solution.

raw_entities.name: Microsoft
raw_entities.description: The technology vendor behind the AI Foundry platform and Teams collaboration suite used in the solution. Microsoft's ecosystem provides the foundational infrastructure for the agentic RAG pattern and data sources.

raw_entities.name: Nationwide
raw_entities.description: Refers to the client's operational scope, indicating that the knowledge management challenge and subsequent solution apply across the entire organization. This scope highlights the need for a scalable, enterprise-grade pattern rather than a localized fix.
